payload.label: chair
payload.long_description: Dark reddish-brown wooden chair back with carved, interlaced circular openwork and a glossy finish; the upper back is partially cropped by the image edge and shows some surface wear and darker discoloration — appears to be about 1.2 m from the camera.

message.content: {"label":"chair","short_description":"ornate dark wooden chair back","long_description":"Dark reddish-brown wooden chair back with carved, interlaced circular openwork and a glossy finish; the upper back is partially cropped by the image edge and shows some surface wear and darker discoloration — appears to be about 1.2 m from the camera.","attributes":["dark reddish-brown wood","carved interlaced circular openwork","upper-back partially cropped","glossy finish","visible wear/discoloration","symmetrical carving pattern"],"distance_from_camera_m":1.2}
